prompt: anime illustration, light novel style, panoramic view of a grand fantasy palace called Grisselda with gray-tinged magical light emanating from its stone walls, in the foreground a 17-year-old girl with flax-colored hair tied low wearing a white pharmacist apprentice uniform stands in a garden of gray flowers, her hands slightly raised with faint gray light between her palms, the palace spires behind her are reflected in morning mist, glass alchemical instruments gleaming on a distant windowsill, a gray crown floating ethereally above the highest tower, mysterious and elegant court atmosphere, muted gray and silver color palette with touches of warm amber

anime illustration, light novel style, a handsome young man around 18 with deep indigo hair and a charming calculated smile (Noel Caeruleus) stepping out of a horse-drawn carriage at a palace gate at dawn, wearing a travel coat over fine noble clothing, holding a leather journal with coded notes, his servant standing behind him, the gray palace spires rising in morning mist behind them, his expression a perfect mask of pleasantness hiding sharp intelligence, blue-themed color palette with gray morning atmosphere, political intrigue and deception mood

anime illustration, light novel style, contemplative morning scene, a 22-year-old woman with features similar to Chloe but more mature (Viola Viridis) tending to medicinal herbs in a small private garden attached to a noble residence, wearing a gray shawl over simple clothes, her expression a perfectly composed gentle smile that hides deep guilt and pain, silver moonlight grass and lavender growing in the garden, a sealed letter visible in her apron pocket, muted green and gray tones, the weight of five years of silence and sacrifice, elegant yet melancholic atmosphere
